name: HORIZON Credit Card
exclusions: transactions excluded under Horizon Credit Card terms
milestoneBenefits: 1,500 EDGE Miles renewal benefit from the second card anniversary year onward
additionalBenefits: 5,000 EDGE Miles on cumulative net spends of Rs 1,000 or more within 30 days of card issuance
5 EDGE Miles per Rs 100 on Axis Bank Travel EDGE portal and direct airline website spends
2 EDGE Miles per Rs 100 on other eligible spends
1 EDGE Mile equals Re 1 as per Axis Bank HORIZON value chart
Up to 24 domestic airport lounge visits per year, subject to programme terms
Up to 8 international airport lounge visits per year, subject to programme terms
1% fuel surcharge waiver on eligible fuel transactions from Rs 400 to Rs 5,000, capped at Rs 400 per statement month

salaried: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
selfEmployed: Eligibility is subject to Axis Bank approval criteria
